# git-review

Git-centric review and release workflow package.

## Included Skills
- `pr-ready`: diff analysis, commit hygiene, branch prep, PR-ready summaries.
- `release-gate`: security and release checks before tagging/shipping.

## Legacy command focus
`branch`, `commit`, `commit-push-pr`, `review`, `security-review`, `pr-comments`, `tag`, `release-notes`.
